summary: Comprehensive testing of MERN stack conversion - Backend converted from FastAPI to Express.js - All functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: API Health Check - GET /api/ returns correct message
Reviews API - GET /api/reviews returns 3 reviews with proper structure
Contact Form API - POST /api/contact stores correctly in MongoDB
Admin Login API - POST /api/admin/login works with admin/yellowochre2024
Admin Contacts Fetch - GET /api/admin/contacts with Basic auth works
Admin Mark as Read - PATCH /api/admin/contacts/:id/read works
Invalid Admin Auth Rejection - Returns 401 for invalid credentials
Homepage Loading - Frontend loads correctly from public URL
Contact Form UI Integration - Form submission works end-to-end
Admin Dashboard Login - Authentication and dashboard access works
Admin Contact Management - View, mark as read, delete operations work
Admin Logout - Successfully logs out and returns to login form
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 API tests passed), Frontend: 100% (All UI flows working), Integration: 100% (Full end-to-end functionality confirmed)
